title: Create: Compact Additions
description: A Create: Simulated / Aeronautics addon that adds compact kinetics for making compact machines and vehicles!
body:
Create: Compact Additions

### Overview Create: Compact Additions adds a few compact kinetics to [Create][1] and [Create: Simulated][2], such as the Inverted Analog Transmission and the Cogged Gearshift. They add neat ways to make compact machines and vehicles. ### Features * Inverted Analog Transmission: A compact and neat way to control RPM with a redstone signal. * Cogged Gearshift: A gearshift with a cogwheel for transferring rotational power sideways and input from the side. ### Technical The inverted analog transmission behaves just like the standard analog transmission, but with its signal flipped. So a signal strength of 10 on the standard analog transmission will output the same RPM as a signal strength of 5 on an inverted analog transmission. The cogged gearshift is an encased cogwheel and gearshift combined, but the cogwheel isn't affected by the gearshift. When the rotational power is inputted from the cogwheel and redstone signal is given, both of the sides reverse their rotation. ### Credits * Textures and models derived from [Create][1] and [Create: Simulated][2] * Most of the code is derived from [Create: Simulated][2] and other Create addons [1]: https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Create [2]: https://github.com/Creators-of-Aeronautics/Simulated-Project
